description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a slim build, depicted in a casual urban outfit. He wears a zip-up jacket with a high collar, layered over a shirt, and fitted pants that reach down to his shoes. His hands are gloved, and his arms are bent at the elbows, with one arm raised behind his back and the other slightly forward. The figure's facial features are defined, with short, neatly styled hair and a neutral expression. The posture suggests a relaxed, confident stance, as if pausing or waiting on a city sidewalk. The model is incomplete below the knees, with the lower legs and feet not fully rendered.
description: A stylized adult male in casual urban clothing, standing with bent arms and gloved hands, featuring short hair and a confident posture. The figure is incomplete below the knees.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, high-collared jacket, gloved hands, and bent arms, with the right arm slightly forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm bent behind the back, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the jacket's collar, and both arms bent, with the right arm more visible behind the back.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile, the left arm bent forward, and the overall posture from a different angle.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket over a shirt and fitted pants with gloves
attribute_posture: standing with arms bent, one behind the back
